name: Google Workspace Duplicate Account Emails
description: Detects duplicate active google_workspace accounts sharing the same email identity.
query: SELECT LOWER(TRIM(u.primary_email)) AS email, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM google_workspace_users u WHERE 1=1 AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.primary_email), '') != '' GROUP BY LOWER(TRIM(u.primary_email)) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
remediation: Consolidate duplicate identities and remove unintended duplicate access paths.
